info.name: Manual
info.description:
## 👀 Variables

`{{name}}` ->> is coming from Pre-Request Script in the POST 'Sign UP'

`{{lastName}}` ->> is coming from Pre-Request Script in the POST 'Sign UP'

`{{email}}` ->> is coming from Pre-Request Script in the POST 'Sign UP'

`{{password}}` ->> is coming from Pre-Request Script in the POST 'Sign UP'

`{{userId}}`\->> is coming from Pre-Request Script in the POST 'Sign UP'

---

`{{`cardId`}}` ->> is coming from Post-Response Script in the POST 'Create New Car'

---

`{{today}}` ->> is coming from Pre-Request Script in the POST 'Create Car Expenses' & 'PUT Edit User's Profile'

`{{expenseId}}` ->> is coming from Post-Response Script in the POST 'Create Car Expenses'

---
